goal: Create plugins/image-paste-preview.js with paste interception and preview strip
sub_tasks: T1: Create IIFE skeleton with __ImagePastePreviewInited guard
T3: handlePaste: e.clipboardData.items iteration, filter for type.startsWith('image/')
T4: For each image item: create blob from getAsFile(), generate object URL, show thumbnail preview in a strip below input
T5: Preview strip shows images as small with X button to remove that image from queue
T6: Store pending images in an array: [{blob, filename}]. Update preview strip on add/remove
T7: If clipboard has text + images mixed: allow text to be inserted normally by not calling e.preventDefault() when no images
T8: msgInput.addEventListener('input', checkIfSendShouldUpload) — on send, append pending image markdown to message
guard_focus: Does paste interception only trigger for actual image paste?
Does normal text paste still work?
Do image previews show with X button?
Can removed images be re-added by pasting again?
notes: ~70 lines. This plugin handles the preview UI and queueing. Upload happens on send in task-imgpaste-2.
